ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the commit */,
  "commit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Branch to which the commit was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the language belongs to */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "language_version" TEXT /* Version of the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the project was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
